page_metadata.biotools__summary: P.R.E.S.S. (Protein Residue-Level Structural Statistics) is an R-package developed to allow researchers to get access to and manipulate on a large set of statistical data on protein residue-level structural properties such as residue-level virtual bond lengths, virtual bond angles, and virtual torsion angles.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: P.R.E.S.S. (Protein Residue-Level Structural Statistics) is an R-package developed to allow researchers to get access to and manipulate on a large set of statistical data on protein residue-level structural properties such as residue-level virtual bond lengths, virtual bond angles, and virtual torsion angles.
